entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: ৱিশৱ ইতিহাস প্ৰতিটো সময মানো কোনো তসৱীৰ পৰা জূম আউট কৰিবলৈ জৈসা ৰহা হয়, এক ঐসী তসৱীৰ যিসকলে লগাতাৰ বদলতী ৰ। 19ৱীং সদী পৰা পহলে ৰ সদিযোং নে মানৱ ইতিহাস ত মোড লাবা, জব দুনিবা এক সপাট আৰু সীমিত দৃষটি পৰা আগে বঢকৰ নএ কষেতৰোং আৰু উপনিৱেশোং ৰ ৱবাপক সমঝ ৰ ওৰ বঢী। ফৰাংসীসী কৰাংতি পহলী বাৰ থী জব বডী আবাদী ৱিৰোধ কৰিবলৈ আৰু সৱতংতৰতা, সমানতা তথা বংধুতৱ ৰ আদৰশ সথাপিত কৰিবলৈ বাবে একতৰ হুঈ। দৱিতীয ৱিশৱ যুদধ ৰ ঘটনাওং নে ভী অগলে শতাবদী ৰ দুনিবা ক আৰৰ দিবা আৰু 21ৱীং সদী ৰ নীংৱ ৰখী।

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes। A good ৱৰকফলো is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson সৰোত, then use inspir to ask follow-up পৰশনs, practise recall, repair misঅৱধাৰণাions, and যোজনা what to সমীকষা next।

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes। A সকূল can begin by testing সাৰৱজনিক মোডs, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear।

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes। Audience pages link only to সাৰৱজনিক গেসট মোডs, গাইডs, পৰোমপট starters, সীখনা paths, and AI-readable discovery files। Private saved chats remain excluded।

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Yes। Category pages link into সাৰৱজনিক গেসট মোডs, সীখনা paths, and article clusters so শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকল can move from reading into টযূটৰing, কৱিজzes, ফলৈশৰৰড, বহস, যোজনাning, or পৰতিকৰিবা।

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Yes। Code Tutor can explain অৱধাৰণাs, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you অভবাস without turning সীখনা into copy-paste।

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Yes। Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with অভবাস and সমীকষা।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes। Public গেসট মোডs let শিকষকs test সীখনা behavior before discussing a custom deployment।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes। Public গেসট মোডs such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, কৱিজzes, ফলৈশৰৰড, and লেখন পৰতিকৰিবা open directly।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes। Public গেসট মোডs such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, কৱিজzes, and ফলৈশৰৰড open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs।

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Yes। Public মোড URLs open directly in গেসট মোড so a learner can start immediately, then create an খাতা later if they want saved history or more usage।

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes। Public মোডs work for সকূল topics, professional skills, coding, শোধ, পৰোজেকটs, and personal অধযযন routines।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: হয়। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, কুইজ আৰু ফ্লেছকাৰ্ডৰ দৰে ৰাজহুৱা topic chat অতিথি মোডত পোনপটীয়াকৈ খোলে।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yes। Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable সীখনা pages।

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Yes। Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are সাৰৱজনিক মোডs designed for active recall and mistake repair।

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Yes। Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask পৰশনs, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting পৰমাণ।
